subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Render thanks within thy soul, inasmuch as God maketh mention of thee at this moment with a sanctified and beloved tongue, and thereby doth exalt [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله ان اشکری فی نفسک بما یذکرک الله حینئذ بلسان قدس محبوب و یرفع بذلک
